hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Host and port of the IOMETE service, e.g. dev.iomete.cloud:443

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: IOMETE lakehouse cluster name to connect to.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.description: Catalog of the data source (e.g. spark_catalog). This is an optional parameter; if left blank, OpenMetadata uses default catalog.

databaseSchema.title: Database Schema
databaseSchema.description: IOMETE database to restrict metadata ingestion to (e.g. default, finance_db). This is an optional parameter; if left blank, OpenMetadata attempts to scan all databases in the catalog.

schemaFilterPattern.title: Default Schema Filter Pattern
schemaFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude IOMETE databases (e.g. 'default', 'finance_db') that match the pattern. In IOMETE, a database corresponds to an OpenMetadata schema.

tableFilterPattern.title: Default Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude tables that matches the pattern.
